title: Academy
subtitle: Sign young talent, develop it, and decide when to promote or sell.
disabledNote: The Academy is coming soon. Stay tuned.
emptyIntake: No intake candidates right now. New candidates arrive every Sunday.
emptyRoster: Sign a candidate above to start developing your own riders.
expiryTooltip: Intake offers run for 7 days. Once an offer lapses the rider goes to a 24h youth auction, and you get the sale money if someone buys him.
fullTooltip: Academy is full ({max}/{max}). Release a rider first.
fullNote: Academy is full. Sign only after a spot opens.
promoteSeniorFullTooltip: Your senior squad is full. Free a senior place first.

transferModal.promoteQuestion: Promote this academy rider to your senior squad:
transferModal.promoteNote: They take a senior place and a senior contract. Their academy salary is replaced by the senior wage shown above.
transferModal.demoteQuestion: Move this senior rider down to your academy:
transferModal.demoteNote: They free a senior place and stop counting toward your senior squad. They are pulled from any upcoming races they were entered in.

error.academyFull: Academy is full. Cannot sign another rider.
error.notOffered: This rider has not been offered a place.
error.insufficientBalance: You cannot afford the signing fee.
error.alreadyAssigned: This rider has already joined an academy.
error.squadFull: Senior squad is full. Free a spot to promote, or sell or release instead.
error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.loadBody: The academy data did not come through. Reload the page, and let us know if it keeps happening.

pnl.heading: Academy accounts
pnl.subtitle: Only realized sales count. Riders still in your academy show no value here until sold.
pnl.premiumCaption: Sale premium is the amount received above each rider's market value at the moment they were listed for sale.
pnl.currentCaption: A snapshot of today's academy, not part of the cash flow totals on the left.
